hooks.prompt: Before stopping, check if this session involved major changes (new features, significant refactoring, multi-file edits, new pages/games). If yes, verify: 1) All changes committed and pushed, 2) CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing, 3) README.md still accurate, 4) docs/ updated if architecture changed, 5) data/search-index.json updated if new searchable content added, 6) sitemap.xml updated if new pages added, 7) No stale branches left, 8) Log session summary to .claude/memory.md via /memory skill. If any items need attention, remind the user. Return {"decision": "block", "reason": "Housekeeping items remain"} to block, or {"decision": "allow"} if all good.
